## Summary


## QA

- [ ] `make check`
- [ ] `make qa`
- [ ] Manual smoke path, if applicable

## Safety boundary

- [ ] No unrestricted shell execution added
- [ ] No exploit automation added
- [ ] No evasion or persistence workflow added
- [ ] No destructive or unscoped network workflow added
- [ ] New execution behavior is typed, scoped, policy-gated, audited, and documented
